splits.end_boundary: wrap jars with paper to prevent bleaching.

splits.title: Guide Lessons - Lesson II: Remodeling Clothing
splits.start_boundary: LESSON II. REMODELING CLOTHING. The points
splits.end_boundary: Made by UTAH-IDAHO SUGAR COMPANY Joseph

files.notes: This file contains two distinct lessons from the Guide Lessons section: Lesson I on Canning Soups (including soup recipes and meat canning recipes) and Lesson II on Remodeling Clothing (including care and repair of clothing and millinery). The boundary between lessons is clearly marked with 'LESSON II.' The file also contains some advertising content at the end which appears to be part of the magazine layout.
